title: erodium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium is a variety of the annual plant Erodium cicutarium, commonly known as redstem storksbill. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial for relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections, fever, and skin conditions. Erodium cicutarium var. pimpinellifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
